title: Design Token Extractor
tagline: Turns any website into a design-token report (colors, type, radius, spacing).
description: Point it at any public website and it reads the page's CSS — linked stylesheets and inline <style> blocks — extracts every `--custom-property`, and groups them into a semantic design-token report: color, typography, spacing, radius, shadow, and more. Useful for reverse-engineering a design system, auditing your own tokens, or seeding a DTCG token file. No API keys: the tool only does plain HTTP fetches.
test: npx eve dev, then ask: "Extract the design tokens from https://vercel.com"
requires: AI Gateway access (Vercel) or an Anthropic API key
